heading: Step 5: Specify an Authorization Expression
body:
You can dynamically authorize requests based on the contents of each request
by defining a **Can Evaluate** [expression variables](atlas/app-services/rules/expressions).
Atlas evaluates the expression whenever the Function is called. If
you do not specify an expression, Atlas automatically
authorizes all authenticated incoming requests.

The expression can expand standard [expression variables](atlas/app-services/rules/expressions),
including the [%%request](atlas/app-services/rules/expressions) and [%%user](atlas/app-services/rules/expressions)
expansions.

![The Function's Can Evaluate JSON expression input in the UI](/atlas-ui/images/triggers/function-can-evaluate-realm-ui.png)
